Notes: The Hawks had three players in double figures led by Maggie Farrell with 14
points and nine boards. First year Artie Williams finished with 12 points and
10 rebounds and Kristen Caban chipped in with 11 points. Nicole Sarcone had
eight points, nine assists and five boards.
Game.Officials: Floyd Douglas,  Michael Barkley,  Allen Jordan
